name: CH informatica
message: CH Informatica SA is the combination of over 10 years of experience in technology consulting, deep knowledge of the market sectors of the Canton of Ticino, ambition and concrete determination to create a real benefit to the customer through innovation, a wide and constantly evolving service offer. * a solid technological and consulting background; * close to the customer, step by step in all phases of implementation for IT projects; * decisive for the customer and for their most suitable choices to develop business; * lean, proactive and reactive; * constantly updated to anticipate market trendshttps://www.chinformatica.ch/
